description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier - discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Machine-checkable contract and assurance layer for ORGANVM repo manifests, governance events, dispatch payloads, UAKS atoms, storefront projections, and conversation-corpus surfaces.
ranked.first_task: Add a generated schema catalog/CLI command (`organvm-validate --list` or `--schema-catalog`) and wire that catalog into Limen's value-tier gate so ranked repos validate seed, ecosystem, network-map, pillar, and storefront contracts before dispatch.
